title: Extend validate to cover message records
description: validate does not yet check message records. Add message validation: schema, a dangling in_reply_to (points at a missing message), and an orphan thread (references a task/issue that does not exist, excluding the reserved `project` channel). Emit coded diagnostics via the error envelope.
acceptance: validate loads and schema-checks message records.
A message whose in_reply_to points at a missing message is flagged.
A message whose thread is neither `project` nor an existing task/issue is flagged.
New codes are added to the CODES catalog; the coverage test still passes.
bun:test covers dangling in_reply_to and orphan thread.
notes: Roadmap Phase 3. Depends on the error envelope catalog (task-error-envelope).
